sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **Money and banking** (3.1). This is syllabus point 3.1 on **Paper 1 (Multiple Choice)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 1 (Multiple Choice), Money and banking often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
